title: alnus alnobetula var. repens
intro: Alnus alnobetula var. repens, commonly known as the green alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, obtained from its bark and leaves. The health benefits of Alnus alnobetula var. repens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
